attributes.name: accept
attributes.description:
Comma-separated list of accepted mime types or file extensions (denoted with a `.`).
If this is left empty, it will allow all types.

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Allows for multiple files to be selected.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

properties.name: accept
properties.description:
Comma-separated list of accepted mime types or file extensions (denoted with a `.`).
If this is left empty, it will allow all types.

properties.name: multiple
properties.description: Allows for multiple files to be selected.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

events.name: change
events.description: fires when a file has been selected.

events.name: reject
events.description: fires when files are rejected due to not matching the accept attribute.

slots.description: For the content of the dropzone
